prompt: I'm picking an LLM API for a production app that needs to process around 10 million tokens per day (roughly 70% input, 30% output). What are the current per-million-token prices for Claude Sonnet (latest), GPT-4o (latest), and Gemini 2.0 Flash? Build a cost comparison table and tell me which is cheapest for my use case. Also note any relevant context window or rate limit differences.

assertions.description: with_skill references models that are current/post-training-cutoff (e.g. Sonnet 4.x, GPT-5, Gemini 2.5)
Response contains specific per-million-token dollar amounts (not vague ranges)
Response calculates or estimates actual cost at the user's stated scale (10M tokens/day)
Response identifies a clear cheapest option with justification
with_skill sources.txt contains at least one URL (without_skill cannot have sources)
